title: polystichopsis nipponica
intro: Polystichopsis nipponica, also known as the Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Polystichopsis nipponica are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
